title: Influence and lead work groups in an automotive manufacturing workplace
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Influence and lead work groups in an automotive manufacturing workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and determine work group task

pcs.text: Work instructions and work health and safety (WHS) requirements are identified1.2 Current work processes are monitored for efficiency and effectiveness1.3 Process methods necessary to complete a group task are planned1.4 Responsibility for planning and completing components of the group task is assigned on an individual or shared basis
